economic_notes: Dakota Plains Wahpeton Oyate Economics Development Corporation excluded from consolidation (equity method not applied; lack of accounting records). First Nation is contingently liable as co-borrower on a Bridging Finance Inc. demand loan with $10,207,930 balance owing as of August 21, 2023 (post year-end default).
notes: Audit disclaimer of opinion issued (not a qualified opinion but a full disclaimer) due to significant internal control weaknesses across cash, accounts receivable, investments, tangible capital assets, accounts payable, payroll, revenue and expenditures. Financial statements marked UNAUDITED. Dakota Plains Wahpeton Oyate Economics Development Corporation excluded from consolidation due to lack of accounting records. Contingent liability as co-borrower on Bridging Finance Inc. loan with $10.2M balance in default as of August 2023. Statements filed September 14, 2023 for fiscal year ended March 31, 2020 — over three years late. OSR is negative due to eliminations and deferred revenue adjustments netting against other revenue lines. Operations and Maintenance segment shows negative revenue of -$327,226 due to inter-entity adjustments.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
